title: Fix Products page: incomplete sub-categories and no products showing

requirements.summary: Fix the Products page to correctly fetch and display the full set of variants for each of the six product category cards from the backend
acceptanceCriteria: Products page renders all six category cards: Rice, Wheat, Pulses, Spices, Processed Food Products, Makhana
Each category card displays the full list of variants fetched from the backend with names and images
Rice card shows all 5 variants, Wheat shows 3, Pulses shows 7, Spices shows 8, Processed Food Products shows 6, Makhana shows 4
No 404 image errors appear for variant images in the browser console
Variant sub-section renders in a grid or scrollable layout consistent with existing card design

file_operations.description: Modify the Products page to fetch product details for each category using the getProductByCategory backend capability with the exact slugs ('rice', 'wheat', 'pulses', 'spices', 'processed-food-products', 'makhana'). Replace hardcoded subcategory arrays with fetched variant data from the backend. Render all variant names and their corresponding images from frontend/public/assets/generated/ in a scrollable or grid sub-section within each category card. Ensure category card links use the correct URL slugs. Handle loading and error states gracefully.

requirements.summary: Fix the ProductDetail page and the useGetProductByCategory hook to ensure all six product categories display their full variant list and product information
acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to /products/rice displays the Rice product detail with all 5 variants in the Product Variants grid
Navigating to /products/wheat displays all 3 wheat variants (Durum Wheat, Whole Wheat, Semolina) with images and nutritional info
Navigating to /products/pulses, /products/spices, /products/processed-food-products, /products/makhana each display their full variant sets
The variant selector for Add to Cart is pre-populated with the full variant list for the selected category
Product image, specifications table, nutritional information section, and add-to-cart controls remain unchanged
useGetProductByCategory passes the raw productId slug to the backend without transformation
Null/undefined backend responses show a 'Product not found' message without a JavaScript crash
No products show a blank or empty state when backend data is available

file_operations.description: Fix the useGetProductByCategory hook to pass the productId URL parameter (category slug) as-is to the backend getProductByCategory capability. Enable the query only when productId is defined. Treat null, undefined, or empty responses as a 'not found' state by returning null gracefully without throwing errors. Ensure proper error handling that does not crash the app.

Fix the ProductDetail page to display the full variant list from the backend in the Product Variants grid section, showing each variant's name and image from frontend/public/assets/generated/. Pre-populate the variant selector for Add to Cart with the complete variant list from the backend response. Handle null/undefined product responses by displaying a 'Product not found' message instead of crashing. Do not alter the existing product image, specifications table, nutritional information section, or add-to-cart controls. Reference generated variant images using their full workspace path (frontend/public/assets/generated/<category>-<variant-slug>.dim_400x400.png).

requirements.summary: Generate representative static images for all product variants missing from frontend/public/assets/generated/
acceptanceCriteria: All 33 variant image files exist under frontend/public/assets/generated/ with the exact filenames listed
No 404 errors are thrown for any variant image on the Products or ProductDetail pages
Each image visually represents the corresponding agricultural product variant
